svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(26, 26, 26), rgb(215, 215, 215));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 54px; height: 1px; padding-top: 19px; margin-left: 124px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1a1a1a;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1a1a1a, #d7d7d7); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
